headline: Trump reportedly wants to 'take the oil in Iran' as Tehran targets water, power facilities in Kuwait
summary: The Middle East conflict has entered its fifth week, with attacks expanding across the region and raising risks to energy and infrastructure.

headline: Brent oil heads for record monthly surge as Iran war enters fifth week
summary: Oil prices climbed on Monday after Yemen's Houthis said they had fired missiles at Israel, opening a new front in the U.S.- and Israeli-led conflict with Iran.

headline: Dow jumps 200 points as fears of Fed rate hike ease: Live updates
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average sank into correction territory on Friday, joining the Nasdaq, which entered a correction the day before.

headline: Halliburton (HAL) Valuation Check After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Recent performance snapshot Halliburton (HAL) has drawn fresh attention after a stretch of solid share price moves, with the stock showing a 4.2% gain over the past day, 10.6% over the past week, and 12.3% over the past month. See our latest analysis for Halliburton. The recent 1 day, 7 day, and 30 day share price returns feed into a stronger trend, with a 90 day share price return of 43.6% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 65.7% suggesting momentum has been building rather than...
